/* ═══════════════ MAKE WEBHOOK ═══════════════ */ (function(){ const WEBHOOK_KEY = "boileau_webhook_url"; const stored = localStorage.getItem(WEBHOOK_KEY) || ""; // Build webhook config UI const webhookSection = document.createElement("div"); webhookSection.id = "webhookConfig"; webhookSection.style.cssText = "margin:0 0 12px;display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;"; webhookSection.innerHTML = ` `; // Insert before the existing footer bar const footer = document.querySelector(".footer-bar"); if(footer) footer.parentNode.insertBefore(webhookSection, footer); document.getElementById("webhookUrl").addEventListener("input", e => { localStorage.setItem(WEBHOOK_KEY, e.target.value.trim()); }); document.getElementById("btnWebhook").addEventListener("click", async () => { const url = document.getElementById("webhookUrl").value.trim(); const msg = document.getElementById("webhookMsg"); if(!url){ alert("Paste your Make webhook URL in the field first."); return; } const payload = buildJSON(); msg.style.display = "inline"; msg.style.color = "#5A6B62"; msg.textContent = "Sending…"; try { const res = await fetch(url, { method:"POST", headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}, body: JSON.stringify(payload) }); if(res.ok || res.status === 200){ msg.style.color = "#157A55"; msg.textContent = "✓ Sent to Make!"; } else { throw new Error("HTTP " + res.status); } } catch(e) { // CORS workaround: Make webhooks may block from file:// or cross-origin // Try no-cors mode as fallback (fire-and-forget) try { await fetch(url, { method:"POST", mode:"no-cors", headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}, body: JSON.stringify(payload) }); msg.style.color = "#157A55"; msg.textContent = "✓ Sent (check Make for confirmation)"; } catch(e2) { msg.style.color = "#c0392b"; msg.textContent = "✗ Error: " + e2.message; } } setTimeout(()=>{ msg.style.display="none"; }, 4000); }); })();
